# Nexus0.5 Execution Layer Pack Overview Reference

Source: NEXUS0.5 docs architecture donor file.
Status: adapted reference.

## Donor Idea
Replace task execution stubs with a capability execution layer that can translate objectives into concrete actions.

## Fresh Nexus Interpretation
- implement through packages execution-graph, capability-router, and runtime boundaries
- keep one authority path and explicit validation gates
- avoid direct copy of donor backend tree
